cadence_rule: 3 carousels/week (Mon · Wed · Fri) · upgrade to Phase 2 ramp if recovery confirmed by 2026-06-02

checkpoints.label: Day 7 recovery check
checkpoints.action: Capture EQS of posts 2 + 3. If 60-min impressions ≥5% of follower count, throttle releasing — continue to week 2.

checkpoints.label: Day 14 phase gate · advance to Phase 2 ramp
checkpoints.action: EQS median across posts 2-5. If ≥30% of follower count at 24h sustained, the cadence holds at 3/week and proceeds with wave-2 carousels. Hold or step back if median is under baseline.

checkpoints.label: Day 28 mid-ramp review
checkpoints.action: Top/bottom 3 EQS across all 7 published carousels. Outliers feed back as derivative formats (per skill §18.5). Anti-pattern check: no repeated USPs in consecutive weeks.

checkpoints.label: Day 42 wave-2 close-out
checkpoints.action: Full slate retrospective. Decide wave 3 format mix (carousel-exclusive vs. add text+image / website-link extrapolation per CEO 2026-05-15 strategy).

next_brief_due: 2026-06-30 (Tuesday) — wave-3 brief generation begins from bank, excluding the 15 IDs in this calendar
